programme.title: Arthur & Merlin: Cavaleiros de Camelot, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Um Rei Arthur muito mais velho retorna para casa após lutar contra o Império Romano. Seu filho ilegítimo corrompeu o trono de Camelot. Agora o Rei Arthur deve se reunir com o mago Merlin e os Cavaleiros da Távola Redonda e lutar para recuperar sua coroa.

programme.title: Valhalla - A Lenda de Thor, (2019, Action)
programme.desc: As crianças vikings Røskva e Tjalfe embarcam em uma aventura para Valhalla com os deuses Thor e Loki. A vida em Asgard, no entanto, acaba sendo ameaçada pelo temido lobo Fenrir e pelos arqui-inimigos bárbaros dos deuses.

programme.title: Jack Hunter, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Jack Hunter percebe que o túmulo do faraó estar vazio, exceto por uma moeda romana, significa que o tesouro foi saqueado para Roma, mas mais tarde provavelmente transferido para a nova capital bizantina, Constantinopla.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles 3, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Um cetro mágico leva April para o Japão antigo. As Tartarugas Ninja viajam no tempo para salvá-la, mas Michelangelo se perde. Donatello, Raphael e Leonardo ajudam uma vila contra o malvado Lorde Norinaga.

programme.title: Thor: Deus do Trovão, (2022, Action)
programme.desc: O inescrupuloso Loki escapou de Asgard e está à procura de Yggdrasil, a árvore que contém toda a força do universo. Ele planeja destruí-la e replantá-la à sua imagem e semelhança.

programme.title: Batalha dos Impérios, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: O general romano Lucius lidera uma legião de mil soldados no país e com o comandante do protetorado das Regiões Ocidentais, Huo An, ele luta para derrotar o assassino Tiberius e restaurar a soberania da China.

programme.title: A Viagem, (2012, Adventure)
programme.desc: Uma exploração de como as ações de vidas individuais impactam umas às outras no passado, presente e futuro, como uma alma vai de assassino a herói, e um ato de bondade se espalha ao longo dos séculos para inspirar uma revolução.

programme.title: Jungle - Protegendo a Selva, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Dipankar Nair administra um santuário de elefantes, mas as coisas começam a ir mal, pois caçadores estão matando elefantes por causa do marfim das presas dos animais.

programme.title: Jack Hunter, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Jack Hunter percebe que o túmulo do faraó estar vazio, exceto por uma moeda romana, significa que o tesouro foi saqueado para Roma, mas mais tarde provavelmente transferido para a nova capital bizantina, Constantinopla.

programme.title: Kickboxer: A Retaliação, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Kurt Sloan prometeu a si mesmo que não voltaria para a Tailândia, mas alguém o seda e o força a retornar ao país asiático.

programme.title: A Hora do Acerto, (2004, Action)
programme.desc: Para a Gangue dos 5, tudo é um videogame: matar policiais, armar emboscadas e criar requintes de crueldade. Quem se torna vítima de suas armadilhas é o inspetor de polícia Wing e todo o seu time de policiais, que são brutalmente assassinados.

programme.title: O Dragão Invencível, (2019, Action)
programme.desc: Um agente da polícia à paisana procura vingança contra um sindicato do crime implacável após o assassinato do seu parceiro.

programme.title: Olhos de Dragão, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Hong usa sua visão moral e habilidades para lutar e salvar um bairro de traficantes de drogas e policiais corruptos.

programme.title: Kickboxer: A vingança do dragão, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: O lendário lutador de Muay Thai Tong Po assassina Eric Sloane covardemente em uma luta. O irmão de Eric, Kurt Sloane, que sempre viveu à sua sombra, desencadeia um grande e forte desejo por vingança.

programme.title: Vingança Fatal, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Um ex-fuzileiro naval e mestre de artes marciais busca vingança em uma cidade dominada pela Yakuza.

programme.title: O Monge à Prova de Balas, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: Baseado em uma história em quadrinhos "underground", ele conta a história de um monge tibetano imortal -Chow- que se torna o mentor de um jovem menino de rua -Scott-, a quem ele ensina a proteger um velho pergaminho que o monge cuidou durante anos.

programme.title: Heatseeker: O Último Desafio, (1995, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Um kickboxer deve resgatar sua noiva de uma corporação maligna.

programme.title: O Dragão Invencível, (2019, Action)
programme.desc: Um agente da polícia à paisana procura vingança contra um sindicato do crime implacável após o assassinato do seu parceiro.

programme.title: Modern Times, (1936, Comedy)
programme.desc: The Tramp struggles to live in modern industrial society with the help of a young homeless woman.

programme.title: The Great Dictator, (1940, Comedy)
programme.desc: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

programme.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World, (1963, Screwball)
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: Detective Story, (1951, Thriller)
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas stars as the rigid detective whose personal code has become twisted from dealing with too many criminals. Eleanor Parker is his wife, tormented by a guilty secret.

programme.title: The Hound Of The Baskervilles, (1959, Drama)
programme.desc: A hellish hound feeds upon the flesh of the heirs of Baskerville Hall. But before this beast can sink its teeth into the newest lord, it must pit its vicious fangs against the searing intellect of Sherlock Holmes (Peter Cushing) and Dr. Watson.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate, (1962, Thriller)
programme.desc: Frank Sinatra, Laurence Harvey, Janet Leigh, and Angela Lansbury headline an all-star cast in this daring thriller rife with political intrigue, mental manipulation, and a diabolical plot that may lead to the highest levels of the government.

programme.title: Seconds, (1966, Thriller)
programme.desc: Desperate to escape his life, Arthur succumbs to a mysterious organization's offer of a new identity and a fresh start. Surgically transformed into the handsome, young Tony Wilson, he begins a jet-set existence among a community of "Reborns."

programme.title: The Train, (1964, War)
programme.desc: Screen greats Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield and Jeanne Moreau star in this suspense-laden tale of justice and retribution as a French Resistance fighter (Lancaster) attempts to stop a Nazi commander from looting the art treasures of Paris.

programme.title: Jack Reacher, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody, who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!"

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: The target: a missile depot in Hanoi. The plane: the A-6 Intruder, a low-altitude bomber with no defensive weapons. The risk: court-martial at the hands of Commander Camparelli...if they live to return.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick, (2022, Action)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Jack Reacher, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody, who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!"

programme.title: Salt, (2010, Espionage Action)
programme.desc: Evelyn Salt swore an oath to duty, honor, and country. She will prove loyal to these when a defector accuses her of being a Russian sleeper spy. Salt goes on the run, using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative to elude capture.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick, (2022, Action)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Jack Reacher, (2012, Action)

programme.title: Cliffhanger, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: This gripping action-adventure tale features Sylvester Stallone as a member of the Rocky Mountain Rescue Team, still grieving over his inability to prevent a friend from falling to her death.

programme.title: Blood and Chocolate, (2007, Werewolves)
programme.desc: The story takes place in modern day Bucharest and tells the tale of nineteen year old Vivian Gandillon, who has spent her life on the run from the truth that she is a werewolf.

programme.title: Hide And Seek, (2021, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman searching for his missing brother is drawn into a dark underworld that threatens his sanity and his family.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath, (2000, Thriller)
programme.desc: The wife of a professor investigates the murder of a beautiful college student who has been appearing to her.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer, (1997, Horror)
programme.desc: After an accident on a winding road, four teens make the fatal mistake of dumping their victim's body into the sea. But exactly one year later, the dead man returns from his watery grave, and he's looking for more than an apology.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer, (1998, Horror)
programme.desc: Remember Ben Willis? He's the fisherman who killed the boy who was driving the car when it went off the road in the fatal accident that killed his daughter, Sara... he's the man in the slicker with a hook in his hand... well, he's back.

programme.title: Carrie, (1976, Horror)
programme.desc: In this all-time horror classic, Carrie (Sissy Spacek) is a loner with no confidence and no friends. When pushed too far, Carrie becomes a vengeance-seeking powerhouse who causes all hell to break loose in a frenzy of blood, fire and brimstone!

programme.title: Carrie, (2002, Horror)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis stars in this adaptation of Stephen King's classic tale of horror. Carrie White has been cursed with the power of telekinesis and when her tormenters commit an act of unforgivable humiliation, they'll soon learn a deadly lesson.

programme.title: Carrie, (2013, Horror)
programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Tower of Grey
programme.desc: The Joestars must defeat DIO within 50 days or Holly's life is forfeit. With no time to lose, they head for Egypt where DIO is thought to be hiding but end up encountering a new threat along the way.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Silver Chariot
programme.desc: Jotaro and his comrades are attacked by Polnareff, an assassin with a Stand called "Silver Chariot" that is capable of lightning-fast swordplay. It falls to Avdol to face down the threat using "Magician's Red."

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Dark Blue Moon
programme.desc: Jotaro welcomes a new member to the team and the group leaves for Singapore by ship. Along the way, a young stowaway is found and Jotaro comes under attack, but is the child the source of this latest evil?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Strength
programme.desc: Jotaro’s group is rescued when they spot a giant cargo ship, but they soon find that the only occupant is a strange orangutan. Curious, they begin to explore the ship and solve its mysteries.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: After mastering Nen and becoming a real Hunter, Gon returns to Whale Island with Killua.

programme.desc: Japan, 1987. Jotaro Kujo, a descendant of the Joestar family, is in prison and claims he is being possessed by an evil spirit. His grandfather, Joseph Joestar, immediately departs for Japan, where he must reveal the family's terrible secret.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow, (2005, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: The tale of DJay, a pimp whose hustle selling sexy Nola leaves him wondering if this is it for him. Only when he trades contraband for a keyboard and bumps into his old schoolfriend Key does he see a way out by laying down some tracks.

programme.title: On the Come Up, (2022, Drama)
programme.desc: The story 16-year-old Bri, who wants to be one of the greatest rappers of all time. Facing controversies and with an eviction notice staring down her family, Bri doesn't just want to make it, she has to.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin', (2005, Musical)
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow, (2005, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: The tale of DJay, a pimp whose hustle selling sexy Nola leaves him wondering if this is it for him. Only when he trades contraband for a keyboard and bumps into his old schoolfriend Key does he see a way out by laying down some tracks.

programme.desc: With showstopping performances by a star-studded cast, Dreamgirls soars with the amazing story of three female singers who learn that anything is possible when you hold on to your dreams.

programme.title: Harlem Nights, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.

programme.title: Purple Rain, (1983, Musical)
programme.desc: Rock star Prince makes a spectacular feature film debut in this highly autobiographical blockbuster that won both an Oscar and a Grammy award.

programme.title: Dragon, (2013, Foreign Action & Adventure)
programme.desc: Liu Jin-xi (Donnie Yen) is a village craftsman whose quiet life is irrevocably shattered by the arrival of two notorious gangsters in the local general store.

programme.title: Kill Zone, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: An inspector and his unit are after a crime boss and are willing to capture him at all costs. The crime boss enlists his top henchmen to end their dirty schemes.

programme.title: Man Of Tai Chi, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves makes his directorial debut in this explosive martial arts drama that reunites him with legendary Matrix Trilogy fight choreographer Yuen Wo Ping and stuntman Tiger Chen.

programme.title: Chocolate, (2015, Action)
programme.desc: A young girl learns to fight from watching TV and the fighters at the boxing school next door. She sets upon a violent quest to collect payment for her ailing mother's medical expenses which ultimately leads her to her father, a member of the Yakuza.

programme.title: Raging Phoenix, (2010, Action)
programme.desc: A violent Thai gang is abducting and killing women around Thailand. Sanim and his friends, having had loved ones abducted, have joined together to break up the gang of kidnappers. In a botched kidnap attempt, Deu (JeeJa Yanin) is saved by Sanim's crew.

programme.title: Ip Man, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Ip Man 2, (2010, Action)
programme.desc: Newly arrived in Hong Kong, martial arts instructor Ip Man encounters stiff opposition when he begins teaching the Wing Chun fighting style. But instead of bowing to his rivals' demands, he perseveres and retaliates with amazing speed and power.

programme.title: Ip Man 3, (2015, Action)
programme.desc: In this explosive third installment of the blockbuster martial arts series, when a band of brutal gangsters led by crooked property developer (Mike Tyson) make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: IP Man 4: The Finale, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Set during the Korean War, a band of prisoners at a POW camp find distraction from the hardships of war and a new sense of freedom in dancing.

programme.title: White Chicks, (2004, Comedy)
programme.desc: What happens when two fumbling FBI agents disguise themselves as mega-rich princesses to infiltrate high society? It's frantic antics and nonstop hilarity as the brothers go from hapless G-men to haute couture G-strings...with attitude!

programme.title: Daddy's Home, (2015, Screwball)
programme.desc: Will Ferrell & Mark Wahlberg face off in this Dad vs Step-Dad showdown! Brad (Ferrell) wants to be the best step-dad to his new wife's kids. But when their actual father Dusty (Wahlberg) shows up, the two must go toe-to-toe in this fun family comedy.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: Dewey Cox had it all: the women (over 411), the friends (Elvis) and the rock 'n' roll lifestyle (every pill and powder). But most of all, he had the music that transformed a dimwitted country boy into the greatest American rock star who never lived.

programme.title: Mr. Mom, (1983, Screwball)
programme.desc: Michael Keaton plays a husband and father who loses his job as an engineer at the auto manufacturing plant. After struggling to find another job, his wife lands a high paying position at an advertising agency.

programme.title: RV, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs. This inspires them to open their own day-care center.

programme.title: Daddy's Home, (2015, Screwball)
programme.desc: Will Ferrell & Mark Wahlberg face off in this Dad vs Step-Dad showdown! Brad (Ferrell) wants to be the best step-dad to his new wife's kids. But when their actual father Dusty (Wahlberg) shows up, the two must go toe-to-toe in this fun family comedy.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: Dreamland, (2021, Drama)
programme.desc: Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment, (1983, Romance)
programme.desc: Terms of Endearment dazzled critics and audiences alike with its believable, insightful story of two captivating people, mother and daughter, unforgettably played by Shirley MacLaine and Debra Winger.

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral, (1994, Romance)
programme.desc: A reserved Englishman meets attractive American Carrie at a wedding and falls in love with her, but his inability to express his feelings seems to forestall any possibility of relationship - until they meet again and again.

programme.title: About Last Night, (1986, Romance)
programme.desc: Rob Lowe doesn't want to get serious. Demi Moore doesn't want to get used. Together, they're an unforgettable couple in the sexy, contemporary comedy, ABOUT LAST NIGHT. Rating: R

programme.title: Terms of Endearment, (1983, Romance)
programme.desc: Terms of Endearment dazzled critics and audiences alike with its believable, insightful story of two captivating people, mother and daughter, unforgettably played by Shirley MacLaine and Debra Winger.

programme.title: Grease, (1978, Musical)
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Grease 2, (1982, Musical)
programme.desc: Return to rockin’ Rydell High for a whole new term! It’s 1961, two years after the original "Grease" gang graduated, and there’s a new crop of seniors – and new members of the coolest cliques on campus.

programme.title: Footloose, (1984, Romance)
programme.desc: A rebellious city boy finds himself in an uptight Midwestern town where dancing and therefore all youthful joy has been banned.

programme.title: And Soon The Darkness, (2010, Thriller)
programme.desc: When two American girls (Amber Heard of ZOMBIELAND, Odette Yustman of CLOVERFIELD) on a bike trip in a remote part of Argentina split up and one of them goes missing, the other must find her before darkness falls.

programme.title: One More Shot, (2024, Action)
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL fights off airport terrorists planning to bomb the State of the Union address.

programme.title: Air Force One, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: When Russian neo-nationalists hijack Air Force One, the world's most secure aircraft, the President is faced with the decision to give in to terrorist demands or sacrifice the country's dignity and the lives of his wife and daughter.

programme.title: The Tailor of Panama, (2001, Thriller)
programme.desc: Based on the 1996 novel, this is a mixture of thriller and black comedy. Harry Pendel is the tailor to the powerful of Panama. Harry is known for his storytelling and suits, but soon his tales carry lethal repercussions.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: When his mentor Admiral James Greer becomes ill, Ryan is appointed acting CIA Director of Intelligence.

programme.title: One More Shot, (2024, Action)
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL fights off airport terrorists planning to bomb the State of the Union address.

programme.title: Shooter, (2007, Action)
programme.desc: Determined to prove his innocence in a double-cross, Bob Lee Swagger is now in a high-tension race from every law enforcement agency in the US and a shadowy organization that wants him dead.

programme.title: The Marksman, (2021, Action)
programme.desc: A hardened Arizona rancher tries to protect an 11-year-old migrant boy fleeing from a ruthless drug cartel.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, War Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill, (1987, War)
programme.desc: On the 11th May 1969, troops of the 101st airborne division engaged the enemy at the base of Hill 937 in the Ashau Valley. Ten days and eleven bloody assaults later, the troops who fought there called it Hamburger Hill.

programme.title: Hart's War, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: War hero Col. McNamara is imprisoned in a German POW camp. As the camp's highest-ranking American officer, he commands his fellow inmates. Never giving up the fight to win the war, McNamara is planning, waiting for his moment to strike back at the enemy.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, War Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill, (1987, War)

programme.title: We Were Soldiers, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Forrest Gump, (1994, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo, (1966, Western)
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Day of the Outlaw, (1959, Western)
programme.desc: Two rival cattlemen forget their differences to fight six outlaws who take over the isolated Western town.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Vera Cruz, (1954, Western)
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: The White Buffalo, (1977, Action)
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: From Noon Till Three, (1976, Action)
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: Rancho Deluxe, (1975, Western)
programme.desc: Jack (Jeff Bridges) and Cecil (Sam Waterston) are an oddball team of modern-day Montana cattle rustlers, and they’ve set their sights on a pair of unlikely ranch owners from New York (Clifton James, Elizabeth Ashley). But can they outfox the foxes?

programme.title: Blazing Saddles, (1974, Comedy)
programme.desc: Ribald, tasteless and hilarious ... this classic spoof of the Western genre by director Mel Brooks pokes fun at everyone and everything.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned- revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen, (2009, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: The battle for Earth continues when college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers and must join in their continued battle against the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon, (2011, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Spy Kids, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: Super-spies Gregorio (Antonio Banderas) and Ingrid (Carla Gugino) give up their lives of intrigue to raise their children. After a sinister super-villain kidnaps the parents, it's up to the kids to come to the rescue.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: In the sequel, the OSS now has a full child-spy section and our hero siblings Carmen and Juni Cortez have become agents. On a mission to recover a dangerous device that threatens the entire world, they enlist the skills of their family.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alexa Vega, and Daryl Sabara return in this third installment of the popular SPY KIDS trilogy that finds Carmen kidnapped by an evil Toymaker (Sylvester Stallone) and imprisoned inside a virtual reality game.

programme.title: Spy Kids, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: Super-spies Gregorio (Antonio Banderas) and Ingrid (Carla Gugino) give up their lives of intrigue to raise their children. After a sinister super-villain kidnaps the parents, it's up to the kids to come to the rescue.

programme.title: Spotlight, (2015, Drama)
programme.desc: This critically acclaimed film chronicles the true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered a decades-long cover-up of child abuse within the local Catholic Archdiocese.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate a murder while pursuing their other full-time professions. Welcome to Hollywood Homicide - the only place where you can come to work hungry, horny, thirsty, and broke, and resolve all four by the end of the watch.

programme.title: Billboard Dad, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: To cheer up their widowed father, a workaholic artist named Max, Tess and Emily Tyler take out a personal ad on a Los Angeles billboard. Although Max receives an overwhelming number of responses, magic strikes when he meets Brooke Anders.

programme.title: Switching Goals, (1999, Comedy)
programme.desc: They may look identical, but these high-spirited twins differ wildly. Teen superstars Mary-Kate and Ashley Olsen executive produce and star in the comedy of two sisters who hatch the ultimate scheme to find out how their other half lives.

programme.title: Passport to Paris, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: Twins from California embark on a whirlwind rendezvous with adventure. They shop at Parisian boutiques, visit the Cathedral of Notre Dame, and dine at the Eiffel Tower. The pair even finds time to help their grandpa with official ambassadorial business.

programme.title: New York Minute, (2004, Comedy)
programme.desc: On the way to a crucial college interview, disciplined, tidy Jane is thwarted by her free-spirited, impulsive, untidy sister Roxy, prompting an unfortunate series of mishaps that almost ruin everything.

programme.title: Billboard Dad, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: To cheer up their widowed father, a workaholic artist named Max, Tess and Emily Tyler take out a personal ad on a Los Angeles billboard. Although Max receives an overwhelming number of responses, magic strikes when he meets Brooke Anders.

programme.title: Switching Goals, (1999, Comedy)
programme.desc: They may look identical, but these high-spirited twins differ wildly. Teen superstars Mary-Kate and Ashley Olsen executive produce and star in the comedy of two sisters who hatch the ultimate scheme to find out how their other half lives.

programme.title: Passport to Paris, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: Twins from California embark on a whirlwind rendezvous with adventure. They shop at Parisian boutiques, visit the Cathedral of Notre Dame, and dine at the Eiffel Tower. The pair even finds time to help their grandpa with official ambassadorial business.

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive, (1986, Horror)
programme.desc: After a mysterious comet turns every machine on Earth into a homicidal rampage device, the survivors at the Dixie Boy Truck Stop are making a stand, and human vengeance goes into overdrive.

programme.title: Amityville 3-D, (1983, Horror)
programme.desc: A reporter moves into the ominous Long Island house to debunk it of the recent supernatural events but is instead besieged by the evil manifestations of a demon-from-hell lurking in the basement.

programme.title: Hellraiser, (1987, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: A woman discovers the newly resurrected, partially formed, body of her brother-in-law and lover. She starts killing for him to revitalize his body and escape the demonic beings that are pursuing him after he escaped their underworld.

programme.title: Hellraiser II: Hellbound, (1988, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: Kirsty is brought to an institution after the horrible events of Hellraiser (1987), where the occult-obsessive head doctor resurrects Julia and unleashes the Cenobites and their demonic underworld.

programme.title: Evil Dead II, (1987, Horror)
programme.desc: Ash, the sole survivor of THE EVIL DEAD, returns to the same cabin in the woods and again unleashes the dead. With his girlfriend possessed and his body parts running amok, Ash must again single-handedly battle the damned in this unhinged horror classic!

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive, (1986, Horror)
programme.desc: After a mysterious comet turns every machine on Earth into a homicidal rampage device, the survivors at the Dixie Boy Truck Stop are making a stand, and human vengeance goes into overdrive.

programme.title: The War of the Worlds, (1953, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Gene Barry and Ann Robinson are among the humans intrigued when a meteor-like object crashes to Earth … but its occupants are definitely not friendly.

programme.title: Barbarella, (1968, Science fiction)
programme.desc: The setting is the planet Lythion in the year 40,000, when Barbarella makes a forced landing while traveling through space. She vanquishes evil in the forms of robots and monsters. She also rewards the handsome men who assist her in the adventure.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Hex, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: Following a mysterious disappearance on a jump, a group of skydivers experience paranormal occurrences that leave them fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Prey, (2007, Action)
programme.desc: While on holiday, an Amerian family are trapped by hungry lions in South Africa.

programme.title: Hell Fest, (2018, Horror)
programme.desc: A serial killer in costume at a Halloween theme park kills off visitors, unbeknownst to bystanders who think it's part of the fun.

programme.title: Catacombs, (2007, Horror)
programme.desc: Horror unfolds when a naïve American makes her first trip to Paris and is invited to an underground rave party in the city's catacombs.

programme.title: Escape Room, (2017, Horror)
programme.desc: For a birthday celebration, three couples partake in an ESCAPE ROOM, in which they must work together to solve puzzles in order to escape the room—but when the game turns deadly, they quickly learn the only winners are the survivors.

programme.title: Sorority Row, (2009, Horror)
programme.desc: They're sisters to the bloody end! After a prank goes fatally wrong, party-hearty sorority girls hide the corpse. Months later, a mysterious killer won't let the past stay buried.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw, (1970, Horror Classics)
programme.desc: A young woman inherits an isolated mansion from a distant relative, but an unspeakable horror awaits her in the mansion's dank cellars.

programme.title: My Bloody Valentine, (2009, Horror)
programme.desc: A remake of George Mihalka's 1981 classic slasher film, MY BLOODY VALENTINE takes place ten years after a devastating coal mining accident when a string of gruesome murders plagues a town.

programme.title: Lords of Salem, (2012, Horror)
programme.desc: From the singular mind of horror maestro Rob Zombie comes a nightmare world where evil forces from a Salem, Massachusetts legend unleash terror upon the modern-day town.

programme.title: Summer Rental, (1984, Screwball)
programme.desc: Comedy sensation John Candy plays the stressed-out air traffic controller whose much-needed family holiday yields one hysterical misadventure after another.

programme.title: Clue, (1985, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes. Featuring all three surprise endings!!

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off, (1986, Screwball)
programme.desc: High school senior, Ferris Bueller, decides to cut school and is determined to experience a day of pure freedom with his girlfriend and best friend in downtown Chicago before graduating.

programme.title: Pretty In Pink, (1986, Romance)
programme.desc: She’s a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He’s the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it’s threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.title: Summer Rental, (1984, Screwball)
programme.desc: Comedy sensation John Candy plays the stressed-out air traffic controller whose much-needed family holiday yields one hysterical misadventure after another.

programme.title: Clue, (1985, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes. Featuring all three surprise endings!!

programme.title: Big, (1988, Screwball)

programme.title: Look Who's Talking, (1989, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: If you've always wanted to know what a baby thinks of the world around him, you finally have your chance. With Bruce Willis supplying the voice of Mikey's thoughts, this is one baby who says exactly what's on his mind. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too, (1990, Comedy)

programme.title: The Guilt Trip, (2012, Screwball)

programme.title: Last Vegas, (2013, Drama)
programme.desc: Four lifelong best friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days. Upon arriving, they quickly realize that the decades have transformed Sin City and tested their friendship in ways they never imagined.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: Harriet M. Welsch is probably the world’s most accomplished 11-year-old spy. Harriet dreams of being a writer, and her nanny and best friend, Golly, told her to start by writing down everything she sees.

programme.title: Dinner for Schmucks, (2010, Screwball)
programme.desc: There’s only one thing keeping aspiring executive Tim from corporate success. He must find the perfect guest to bring to his boss’s monthly dinner party, where the winner of the evening is the one who arrives with the biggest buffoon.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Action)

programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction, (1994, Thriller)
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Hoodlum, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: Witness, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: The Big Hit, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction, (1994, Thriller)
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: We Own the Night, (2007, Thriller)
programme.desc: What if your own family stood in the way of everything you worked for? Bobby Green (Joaquin Phoenix) has forsaken his name to escape his family and their tradition in law enforcement to pursue his ambitions as a Brooklyn nightclub owner. Rated R

programme.title: Revolver, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: REVOLVER is populated with Guy Ritchie's (Snatch; Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels) classic breed of fast-talking, sharp-suited gangsters but with a psychological twist that your mind may not be able to handle.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer, (1993, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Comedy sensation Mike Myers stars with Nancy Travis in this hatchet-driven romantic comedy about a wedlock-shy coffee house poet who finally meets the perfect woman. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Fatal Attraction, (1987, Drama)
programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.

programme.title: Shall We Dance?, (2004, Romance)
programme.desc: John Clark is a meek workaholic who feels trapped in a dull, mind-numbing existence. One night, his whole life changes after the sight of a beautiful dance instructor inspire him to break out of his mold and sign up for some fancy footwork.

programme.title: Swiss Army Man, (2016, Comedy)
programme.desc: Hank (Paul Dano) is stranded on a deserted island and given up all hope. Everything changes when a corpse (Daniel Radcliffe) washes ashore. They become fast friends and go on an epic adventure to bring Hank back to the woman of his dreams.

programme.title: Obvious Child, (2014, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A one night stand leaves a woman (Jenny Slate) with an unexpected surprise just in time for Valentine's Day in this hilarious and heartwarming romantic comedy that has critics audiences raving.

programme.title: Laggies, (2014, Drama)
programme.desc: A woman (Keira Knightley) stuck in permanent adolescence lies to her fiancé about going on a retreat and spends the time hanging out with teenagers (Chloe Grace Moretz) instead. A comedy about acting your age and other adult decisions.

programme.title: The Disaster Artist, (2017, Comedy)
programme.desc: Hollywood outsider Tommy Wiseau and his best friend pursue their dream and embark on the hilarious odyssey of making a now-infamous cult classic film.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls At Parties, (2018, Romance)
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Enn, a shy teenager in 70s London, meets the beautiful and rebellious Zan (Elle Fanning) at a party. They set in motion the ultimate showdown between their rivaling worlds and test the limits of how far they will go for true love.

programme.title: C'mon C'mon, (2021, Drama)
programme.desc: Johnny and his young nephew forge a tenuous but transformational relationship when they are unexpectedly thrown together in this delicate and deeply moving story about the connections between adults and children, the past and the future.

programme.title: South Park: Bigger, Longer & Uncut, (1999, Comedy)
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman sneak into an R-rated movie that warps their fragile minds. Soon their parents declare war on Canada and the guys are America's last hope to stop Armageddon.

programme.title: Wayne's World, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2, (1993, Comedy)
programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: Election, (1999, Political Comedies)
programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon plays Tracy Flick, a straight-A go-getter determined to be president of Carver High’s student body. Popular teacher Jim McAllister (Broderick) decides to derail Tracy’s obsessive overachieving by recruiting an opposition candidate.

programme.title: Braveheart, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: The Firm, (1993, Thriller)
programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker, (1997, Thriller)
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: Braveheart, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror, (1979, Horror Classics)
programme.desc: Supposed true story about the Lutzm family whose dream house turns into a nightmare. The unsuspecting new tenants of a house whose previous occupants had been murdered in their sleep.

programme.title: Capricorn One, (1977, Thriller)
programme.desc: A NASA Mars mission won't work, and its funding is endangered, so they decide to fake it just this once. But then they have to keep the secret.

programme.title: The Man Who Fell To Earth, (1976, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Thomas Jerome Newton (David Bowie) is a humanoid alien who comes to Earth to get water for his dying planet. He starts a high technology company to get the billions of dollars he needs to build a return spacecraft.

programme.title: King Kong, (1976, Adventure)
programme.desc: A petroleum exploration expedition comes to an isolated island and encounters a colossal giant gorilla.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz, (1979, Action)
programme.desc: Superstar Clint Eastwood and director Don Siegel re-team for their fifth film in this fascinating account of the only three men ever to escape from the infamous maximum security prison at Alcatraz.

programme.title: White Lightning, (1973, Action)
programme.desc: In one of his most memorable roles, Burt Reynolds portrays a moonshine whiskey runner who turns state's witness to avenge the murder of a boy no one understood.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Assimilation: Part 1
programme.desc: To get a lead on Yuma and his buddies, Vector bombards Earth with bogus Numbers. When one of them takes the bait, it puts Mr. Heartland and his sinister swarm of insect monsters hot on the gang’s heels!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Assimilation: Part 2
programme.desc: With Kite grounded, Yuma and Astral step up to take the buzzing Barian, Mr. Heartland down! Can our heroes repel this pest, or will they end up getting squashed instead?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Battle with the Barians
programme.desc: When all seven Barian Emperors ambush Yuma, some friendly faces drop in to help take the Barians out!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Fight for a Friend
programme.desc: Quattro faces off against the Barian leader, Nash! Hoping to find Shark swimming just beneath his new Barian identity, Quattro looks to hook his old friend and reel him back in!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Farewell for a Friend
programme.desc: The back and forth battle between Nash and Quattro comes to a climactic conclusion! Will this battle lure the real Shark out from inside his Barian form, or will it cost Quattro much more than he ever could have imagined?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Settling the Score: Part 1
programme.desc: Looking to get revenge for their brother Quattro, Trey and Quinton team up to take down the treacherous Barian, Mizar!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Settling the Score: Part 2
programme.desc: As Quinton and Trey's devastating double duel against Mizar flares to a feverish finish, the brothers reveal the real reason they are battling the Barian! Their startling secret hits Mizar harder than any attack!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Fists of Fury: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral's race to face Don Thousand is stopped cold by the hot-blooded Alito, now brainwashed by the Barian deity! Can they think fast enough to free Alito of Don Thousand, or will he take the two down for the count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Fists of Fury: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral duel desperately to try and turn an old enemy into their newest ally, but with Don Thousand in Alito’s corner, Yuma and Astral find themselves up against the ropes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Power Play
programme.desc: Vector sets his sights on squashing Marin and Dumon, and there’s nothing Shark can do but watch his sister and best friend squirm before his eyes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Barian vs. Barian
programme.desc: The thunderous battle between Marin, Dumon and Vector shatters expectations as it nears its startling end! Meanwhile, Alito stands tall against his former friend, the Barian behemoth - Girag!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Vector the Victor
programme.desc: Marin's duel with Vector charges to its climactic conclusion! Can Marin outduel this venomous villain, or will Vector remain invincible?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Dragon Strife: Part 1
programme.desc: The long foreshadowed faceoff is finally here! Kite and Mizar go toe-to-toe to settle who is the one true Galaxy-Eyes master!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Dragon Strife: Part 2
programme.desc: The fierce face-off between Kite and Mizar soars to new heights as their battle to determine the one true Galaxy-Eyes master roars to a finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Forsaken Palace
programme.desc: Nash races to face Vector, but with Vector's enhanced strength, he may be speeding towards his own demise!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Clash of the Emperors
programme.desc: While Nash and Vector's danger-fueled duel hits dizzying new heights of havoc, the truth behind Vector’s dark past is revealed!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The New World
programme.desc: Yuma teams up with an unlikely ally to take down the great Barian deity, Don Thousand! Can this twosome draw out a victory, or will Don Thousand douse any hope these heroes have of being victorious?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Source Code
programme.desc: Yuma and Shark’s battle with Don Thousand takes a treacherous turn when the great Barian deity reveals he can rewrite their cards into entirely different cards! Can Yuma and Shark defeat a foe who can change their every move?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Thousand Ways to Lose
programme.desc: Yuma and Shark turn the tides and put Don Thousand on the brink of defeat, but DonThousand still has a thousand tricks up his sleeve!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Fate of Three Worlds
programme.desc: Once friends, now foes - Yuma and Shark face off in a battle where winning could mean losing everything!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Battle of Three Worlds
programme.desc: Winning comes with the ultimate price when Yuma realizes victory will cost more than just losing his friendship with Shark, it will mean losing Shark forever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Future of Three Worlds
programme.desc: Expect the unexpected as the game-changing conclusion of Yuma’s duel against Shark flares to a frenzied finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Last First Duel
programme.desc: Having gathered all one hundred Numbers, Astral is finally prepared to fulfill his mission – to destroy Barian World! But in order to see his mission through, Astral will have to destroy his friendship with Yuma first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Outclassed and Outmatched
programme.desc: The battle between Yuma and Astral rages on as the best of friends become the fiercest of foes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Forever ZEXAL
programme.desc: Feel the flow for the final time as Yuma and Astral high-five the sky in the cosmic conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions
programme.desc: The stakes have never been higher, the rivalries never as fierce, the risks never so great. One wrong move - one card short - and it's game over for good.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Zoro unleashes a demonic nine sword fighting style on his giraffe opponent, Luffy buys time for Franky by ascending to second gear, and Robin refuses to give up hope of being rescued!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Demon god zoro! An incarnation of asura born from fighting spirit!

programme.title: Spandam cruely drags Robin ever closer to the gates of justice, but the battle takes a turn for the better when the Sniper King makes a surprise appearance!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Spandam frightened! The hero on the tower of law!

programme.title: Luffy’s battle with Lucci reveals the powerful secrets of the rubber man’s second gear, and the Spandam’s thoughtless Buster Call begins with a brutal barrage of cannonballs.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Robin freed! Luffy vs. Lucci, showdown between leaders!

programme.title: When an ancient tree is stolen by a madman with the power to freeze time, Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji track down the culprit in an attempt to save a village’s annual festival!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Boss luffy is the culprit? Track down the missing great cherry tree!

programme.title: Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Zoro, and company find themselves trapped in a tunnel filled with rapidly rising water. Meanwhile, Luffy musters the strength for one last stand in his battle with Lucci.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I can't protect anyone unless i win! Third gear activated!

programme.title: Flashback to the dark past of Rob Lucci as the young boy learns to dispense a cold, cruel, and brutal brand of justice. Back in real time, Luffy’s battle with Lucci threatens to destroy the navy fleet.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shivering past! Dark justice and rob lucci!

programme.title: Luffy’s gigantic attack on Lucci takes a devastating toll on his body, Robin rejoins the fight, and the rest of the Straw Hats struggle to survive underwater!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A mysterious mermaid appears? As consciousness fades away…

programme.title: Thanks to a little help from what appears to be a mermaid, the Straw Hats find themselves reunited aboard an escape vessel, but the fate of Luffy and the Franky Family is yet to be determined!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Cannon fire sinks the island! Franky's lamentation!

programme.title: Luffy pushes his body to the breaking point in his battle with Lucci, and the rest of the Straw Hats try to fight off a fleet of Marines until their captain returns – if he ever does.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Wait for luffy! Mortal combat on the bridge of hesitation!

programme.title: Luffy lies battered and badly beaten, but Usopp’s desperate pleas inspire the rubber-man to mount one final, furious attack on Rob Lucci!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fists full of emotion! Luffy unleashes gatling with all his might!

programme.title: With their leader crippled by exhaustion and their escape ship destroyed, the Straw Hats find themselves with only one treacherous option: throwing themselves into the sea!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: From the sea, a friend arrives! The straw hats share the strongest bond!

programme.title: The Straw Hats are rescued by the unexpected arrival of a dear old friend, but they’ll have to avoid a barrage of deadly cannonballs in order to survive!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everyone makes a great escape! The road to victory is for the pirates!

programme.title: The Straw Hats bid a tearful farewell to the brave little ship that was their home for so very many adventures. Rest in peace, Merry!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Thank you, merry! Snow falls over the parting sea!

programme.title: The Straw Hats get some much needed rest and relaxation, Franky makes a big announcement, and Vice Admiral Garp tracks down his grandson!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Peace interrupted! A navy vice admiral with a fist of love!

programme.title: Luffy’s friends are shocked to learn that his grandpa is a marine hero, but that’s nothing compared to how surprised they’ll be by his father’s true identity!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The strongest family? Luffy's father revealed!

programme.title: Luffy gets the chance to catch up with his old friend Coby, Nami does some serious snooping, and Robin is paid a chilling visit from a terrifying face from her past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Its name is the new world! The fate of the grand line!

programme.title: Shanks visits Whitebeard with a serious request, Franky and Iceberg begin construction on a ship for the Straw Hats, and news spreads of the events at Enies Lobby.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shanks makes a move! The linchpin to the reckless era!

programme.title: Luffy and Chopper risk their lives to help a heartbroken young girl track down her long lost pet!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A girl in search of her yagara! Great search in the city of water!

programme.title: Zoro’s day takes a turn for the crazy when his search for a new sword is derailed by a couple of meddling orphans!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Mothers are strong! Zoro's hectic household chores!

programme.title: Sanji spends the day with a very old chef who teaches him the secret of packing amazing flavor into each and every dish!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sanji's shock! Mysterious old man and his super yummy cooking!

programme.title: Franky and Iceberg stay up all night on a mission to finish a new ship for the Straw Hats, but the first light of day brings troubling news!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everyone finally has a bounty! A pirate group worth over 600 million!

programme.title: With their new ship completed, Luffy and the gang get ready to set sail, but first, they’ll have to steal some underpants in order to secure the services of a shipwright!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The king of animals that overlooks the sea! The dream ship magnificently completed!

programme.title: A series of flashbacks to his younger days – and some painful persuasion by Robin – help Franky make the difficult decision to leave his friends and go to sea with the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Goodbye my dear underlings! Franky departs!

programme.title: Luffy and the Straw Hats are ready for their next adventure, but before they can move on they must await the return of Usopp – and avoid a barrage of cannonballs courtesy of Garp!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Departing the city of water! Usopp mans up and brings closure to the duel!

programme.title: The Straw Hats’ new ship gets a name, and Franky shows off some of its special features as the gang goes sky high to avoid being sunk by the marines!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Wanted posters make it around the world! Celebration in their hometowns as the ship moves forward!

programme.title: Ace and Blackbeard go toe-to-toe in an epic clash of Devil Fruit powers that pits fire against darkness – and threatens to destroy an entire island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The most heinous power! Blackbeard's darkness attacks ace!

programme.title: Luffy and his mates cross paths with a ragged gang of sailors. The Straw Hats are quick to offer assistance, but their new friends may be up to no good!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious Band of Pirates! Sunny and the Dangerous Trap!

programme.title: The Straw Hats discover that their fishermen friends are actually pirates, but Chopper refuses to abandon a very sick patient.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sunny in a Pinch! Roar, Secret Superspeed Mecha!

programme.title: The captain of the Phoenix Pirates loses his will to fight, and the Straw Hats get trapped in a field of icebergs by some figure skating bounty hunters!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Dream Sinking in the New World! The Disillusioned Pirate, Puzzle!

programme.title: Nami and Franky take a spin in the shark sub, Usopp and Sanji have a run in with a flock of deadly penguins, and Puzzle can no longer hide the fact that he's alive!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Assassins Attack! The Great Battle on Ice Begins!

programme.title: Robin is shocked by her encounter with an adorable bounty hunter, Franky and Nami get trapped in a frozen shark, and Luffy's quest to recapture his flag sends him sinking toward the bottom of the sea!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Staw Hat’s Hard Battles! A Pirate Soul Risking It All for the Flag!

programme.title: Luffy battles a set of magnetic twins, Sanji and Usopp fall victim to a pair of figure skating lovebirds, and Zoro has a drink with the man who stole the Straw Hat flag!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hot Full Throttle! The Twin’s Magnetic Power Drawing Near!

programme.title: Robin's cola care package helps spring her friends from an icy prison, and Luffy's bold words inspire a battered and beaten pirate to keep fighting!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Mansion of Great Chaos! The Enraged Don and the Captured Crew!

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: The non-human machine ruling elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg assassin into the past to kill a young boy because he soon will be the resistance leader against the machines.

programme.title: Terminator Genisys, (2015, Action)
programme.desc: When John Connor sends Kyle Reese back to 1984 to protect a young Sarah Connor, unexpected events alter the past and threaten the future for all mankind. Charged with a new mission, Reese must join forces with Sarah and her "Guardian" to save the world.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: The Fifth Element, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Milla Jovovich, and Gary Oldman star in acclaimed director Luc Besson's outrageous sci-fi adventure, an extravagantly styled tale of good against evil set in an unbelievable twenty-third century world.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter, (1964, Drama)
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: The Iron Sheriff, (1957, Drama)
programme.desc: Sterling Hayden plays a sheriff with continuing moral dilemmas. Should he relate a deathbed confession which falsely implicates his son in a murder? Should he carry out his threat to cold-bloodedly kill the real murderer or bring him to legal justice?

programme.title: McLintock!, (1963, Drama)
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Run For Cover, (1955, Drama)
programme.desc: Ex-criminal in the old days of the West teaches a woman the ways of love and a boy the art of courage.

programme.title: Fort Massacre, (1958, Drama)
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: Stagecoach, (1939, Drama)
programme.desc: Dallas is a woman with a past who has been driven out of town by the high-minded ladies of the community. Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him.

programme.title: High Noon, (1951, Drama)
programme.desc: Gary Cooper won the Oscar for the Best Actor in this classic tale of a lawman who stands alone to defend a town of cowardly citizens against a gang of revenge-seeking criminals.

programme.title: Gunfight At The O.K. Corral, (1957, Drama)
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Red River, (1948, Drama)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: For many years a mysterious monk with no name (Chow Yun-Fat) has zigzagged the globe to protect an ancient scroll -- a scroll that holds the key to unlimited power. Now the Monk must look for a new scrollkeeper.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: For Kiki (Julia Roberts), being the personal assistant to the beautiful megastar, Gwen (Catherine Zeta-Jones), isn't easy. In fact, it's nearly impossible since the man of her dreams is Eddie (John Cusack), Gwen's estranged husband.

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Disturbia, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: Along Came A Spider, (2001, Thriller)
programme.desc: After the harrowing death of his partner, detective and best-selling author Alex Cross has retreated to the peace of retirement. But when a brilliant criminal (Michael Wincott) kidnaps a senator’s young daughter, Alex is lured back into action.

programme.title: Identity, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: What if every choice we ever make was already made for us? What if there really were no coincidences in life and our destinies were already predetermined? Ten strangers with secrets are brought together in a savage rainstorm. Rated: R

programme.title: The plan involving Alexandrians, Kingdommers and Hilltoppers unfolds; as Rick continues to fight, he encounters a familiar face.

programme.title: A close look at Negan and the lives of the Saviors during the conflict through a familiar set of eyes.

programme.title: Negan has to enlist the help of his lieutenants in solving a huge issue facing the Sanctuary; Rick and the group continue to enact the plan.

programme.title: Every story and battle from the first half of the season comes crashing together in this action-packed, emotional mid-season finale.

programme.title: Hilltop's leadership faces a difficult dilemma after the arrival of unexpected visitors; Rick comes face to face with an adversary.

programme.title: Trouble arises when unexpected visitors arrive at the Hilltop and the community is thrust into action; heartbreaking discoveries are made.

programme.title: A Heaps prisoner makes a discovery; Carol searches for someone in the nearby forest; Rick and Morgan find themselves in the company of strangers.

programme.title: With the threat of the Saviors still looming, Aaron continues searching for allies; Daryl and Rosita take action and confront an old friend.
